title: Java RandomAccessFile
summary: The Java RandomAccessFile class enables you to read from and write to a file at arbitrary locations. In other words, you can move freely around the file, both forth and back, and read from or write to the file at the desired location. I have updated the Java RandomAccessFile tutorial to explain better how to use it.
